publishedAbstract: The noobaa-db-pg-cluster- <1|2> PVC has become full, preventing the PostgreSQL server from starting. **Related Articles:** [Expanding the db-noobaa-db-pg-0 PVC- OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) v4.18 and Below](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/6976547) [Change the Multi-Cloud Object Gateway Database's Collation Locale to C](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7031666) [How to Check the Size/Consumption of the PostgreSQL Database in the db-noobaa-db-pg-0 PVC](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7116750)
publishedTitle: Expanding the db-noobaa-db-pg-0 PVC - OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) v4.19+
